title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_context_builder.py (第 1 至 144 行，共 144 行) ---
   1 | """Prompt 记忆上下文构建器。
   2 | 
   3 | 阶段5引入：把 Hybrid Recall 结果按任务类型、置信度、去重和 token budget
   4 | 格式化为可控的 prompt 注入片段，避免直接拼接全部记忆造成上下文污染。
   5 | """
   6 | 
   7 | from __future__ import annotations
   8 | 
   9 | import re
  10 | from typing import Iterable, List, Optional, Sequence, Set
  11 | 
  12 | from core.memory_items import MemoryKind, MemoryRecallResult
  13 | 
  14 | 
  15 | class MemoryContextBuilder:
  16 |     """根据 token budget 构造可注入系统提示词的长期记忆上下文。"""
  17 | 
  18 |     TASK_KIND_PRIORITY = {
  19 |         "code_edit": [MemoryKind.BUG.value, MemoryKind.WORKFLOW.value, MemoryKind.DECISION.value, MemoryKind.ARCHITECTURE.value],
  20 |         "architecture": [MemoryKind.ARCHITECTURE.value, MemoryKind.DECISION.value, MemoryKind.FACT.value, MemoryKind.WORKFLOW.value],
  21 |         "test_failure": [MemoryKind.BUG.value, MemoryKind.PROCEDURAL.value, MemoryKind.WORKFLOW.value, MemoryKind.FACT.value],
  22 |         "documentation": [MemoryKind.PREFERENCE.value, MemoryKind.ARCHITECTURE.value, MemoryKind.DECISION.value, MemoryKind.TASK.value],
  23 |         "git": [MemoryKind.WORKFLOW.value, MemoryKind.PREFERENCE.value, MemoryKind.BUG.value, MemoryKind.PROCEDURAL.value],
  24 |         "general": [MemoryKind.BUG.value, MemoryKind.ARCHITECTURE.value, MemoryKind.WORKFLOW.value, MemoryKind.DECISION.value, MemoryKind.PREFERENCE.value],
  25 |     }
  26 | 
  27 |     def __init__(
  28 |         self,
  29 |         default_token_budget: int = 1500,
  30 |         max_items: int = 8,
  31 |         per_item_char_limit: int = 200,
  32 |         min_confidence: float = 0.2,
  33 |     ):
  34 |         self.default_token_budget = default_token_budget
  35 |         self.max_items = max_items
  36 |         self.per_item_char_limit = per_item_char_limit
  37 |         self.min_confidence = min_confidence
  38 | 
  39 |     def build(
  40 |         self,
  41 |         query: str,
  42 |         memories: Sequence[MemoryRecallResult],
  43 |         token_budget: Optional[int] = None,
  44 |         task_type: Optional[str] = None,
  45 |         max_items: Optional[int] = None,
  46 |     ) -> str:
  47 |         """构造受预算约束的记忆上下文。"""
  48 |         if not memories:
  49 |             return ""
  50 | 
  51 |         budget = max(0, token_budget or self.default_token_budget)
  52 |         if budget <= 0:
  53 |             return ""
  54 | 
  55 |         inferred_task_type = task_type or self.infer_task_type(query)
  56 |         char_budget = budget * 4  # 粗略估算：1 token ~= 4 chars
  57 |         selected = self._select_memories(memories, inferred_task_type, max_items or self.max_items)
  58 | 
  59 |         lines: List[str] = ["\n[相关长期记忆]", "### 相关长期记忆", f"任务类型: {inferred_task_type}"]
  60 |         used_chars = sum(len(line) + 1 for line in lines)
  61 | 
  62 |         for index, result in enumerate(selected, 1):
  63 |             item = result.item
  64 |             files = ", ".join(item.files[:4]) if item.files else "无"
  65 |             sources = ", ".join(item.source_session_ids[:3]) if item.source_session_ids else result.source
  66 |             content = self._truncate_clean(item.content, self.per_item_char_limit)
  67 |             block_lines = [
  68 |                 f"{index}. [{item.kind}] {item.title}",
  69 |                 f"   来源: {files}; {sources}",
  70 |                 f"   相关度: {result.score:.2f}; 原因: {result.reason}",
  71 |                 f"   内容: {content}",
  72 |             ]
  73 |             block = "\n".join(block_lines)
  74 |             block_cost = len(block) + 1
  75 |             if used_chars + block_cost > char_budget:
  76 |                 remaining = char_budget - used_chars - 80
  77 |                 if remaining > 60:
  78 |                     short_content = self._truncate_clean(item.content, min(remaining, self.per_item_char_limit))
  79 |                     block = "\n".join(block_lines[:-1] + [f"...
